psalm-105-1.verse:
Oh give thanks to the Lord, call upon His name;
  Make known His deeds among the peoples.
psalm-105-1.prayer: Lord, help me give thanks to You and call upon Your name. Let my life make Your deeds known with gratitude and joy.

psalm-105-2.verse:
Sing to Him, sing praises to Him;
  Speak of all His wonders.
psalm-105-2.prayer: Father, fill my mouth with songs of praise and help me speak often of Your wonderful works.

psalm-105-3.verse:
Glory in His holy name;
  Let the heart of those who seek the Lord be glad.
psalm-105-3.prayer: Lord, let my heart glory in Your holy name. Help me rejoice as one who seeks You.

psalm-105-4.verse:
Seek the Lord and His strength;
  Seek His face continually.
psalm-105-4.prayer: Father, teach me to seek You and Your strength continually. Keep my heart turned toward Your presence.

psalm-105-5.verse:
Remember His wonders which He has done,
  His marvels and the judgments uttered by His mouth,
psalm-105-5.prayer: Lord, help me remember Your wonders, Your miracles, and the truth of Your judgments.

psalm-105-6.verse:
O seed of Abraham, His servant,
  O sons of Jacob, His chosen ones!
psalm-105-6.prayer: Father, thank You for calling Your people to belong to You. Help me live as one who carries Your promises with faith.

psalm-105-7.verse:
He is the Lord our God;
  His judgments are in all the earth.
psalm-105-7.prayer: Lord, You are my God, and Your judgments are over all the earth. Help me trust Your righteousness.

psalm-105-8.verse:
He has remembered His covenant forever,
  The word which He commanded to a thousand generations,
psalm-105-8.prayer: Father, thank You for remembering Your covenant forever. Strengthen my confidence in Your faithful promises.

psalm-105-9.verse:
The covenant which He made with Abraham,
  And His oath to Isaac.
psalm-105-9.prayer: Lord, thank You for keeping what You promised through every generation. Help me trust Your Word.

psalm-105-10.verse:
Then He confirmed it to Jacob for a statute,
  To Israel as an everlasting covenant,
psalm-105-10.prayer: Father, establish my heart in Your covenant faithfulness and teach me to rely on Your unchanging truth.

psalm-105-11.verse:
Saying, “To you I will give the land of Canaan
  As the portion of your inheritance,”
psalm-105-11.prayer: Lord, thank You for preparing inheritance and blessing for Your people. Help me receive Your promises with humility.

psalm-105-12.verse:
When they were only a few men in number,
  Very few, and strangers in it.
psalm-105-12.prayer: Father, when I feel small, weak, or uncertain, remind me that Your promises are not limited by my strength.

psalm-105-13.verse:
And they wandered about from nation to nation,
  From one kingdom to another people.
psalm-105-13.prayer: Lord, guide me faithfully through every place and season of life, just as You guided Your people.

psalm-105-14.verse:
He permitted no man to oppress them,
  And He reproved kings for their sakes:
psalm-105-14.prayer: Father, thank You for protecting Your people. Keep me safe under Your watchful care.

psalm-105-15.verse:
“Do not touch My anointed ones,
  And do My prophets no harm.”
psalm-105-15.prayer: Lord, help me honor what You have set apart and respect the people and purposes You have chosen.

psalm-105-16.verse:
And He called for a famine upon the land;
  He broke the whole staff of bread.
psalm-105-16.prayer: Father, when seasons of lack or difficulty come, help me trust that You still provide and lead.

psalm-105-17.verse:
He sent a man before them,
  Joseph, who was sold as a slave.
psalm-105-17.prayer: Lord, thank You for preparing help before the need is fully seen. Help me trust Your timing.

psalm-105-18.verse:
They afflicted his feet with fetters,
  He himself was laid in irons;
psalm-105-18.prayer: Father, when hardship feels painful or confining, strengthen me and keep my faith steady.

psalm-105-19.verse:
Until the time that his word came to pass,
  The word of the Lord tested him.
psalm-105-19.prayer: Lord, refine me through waiting seasons until Your word is fulfilled in Your perfect time.

psalm-105-20.verse:
The king sent and released him,
  The ruler of peoples, and set him free.
psalm-105-20.prayer: Father, thank You that You can open doors no one else can open and bring freedom at the right time.

psalm-105-21.verse:
He made him lord of his house
  And ruler over all his possessions,
psalm-105-21.prayer: Lord, help me steward responsibility with humility and wisdom when You entrust me with influence.

psalm-105-22.verse:
To imprison his princes at will,
  That he might teach his elders wisdom.
psalm-105-22.prayer: Father, teach me to use every position, gift, or opportunity to honor You and serve others.

psalm-105-23.verse:
Israel also came into Egypt;
  Thus Jacob sojourned in the land of Ham.
psalm-105-23.prayer: Lord, guide me when I enter new places or unfamiliar seasons. Help me trust Your presence wherever You lead.

psalm-105-24.verse:
And He caused His people to be very fruitful,
  And made them stronger than their adversaries.
psalm-105-24.prayer: Father, thank You for strengthening Your people. Help me grow in faith, courage, and endurance.

psalm-105-25.verse:
He turned their heart to hate His people,
  To deal craftily with His servants.
psalm-105-25.prayer: Lord, when opposition rises, remind me that You remain sovereign even over difficult circumstances.

psalm-105-26.verse:
He sent Moses His servant,
  And Aaron, whom He had chosen.
psalm-105-26.prayer: Father, thank You for sending servants according to Your purpose. Help me obey when You call me.

psalm-105-27.verse:
They performed His wondrous acts among them,
  And miracles in the land of Ham.
psalm-105-27.prayer: Lord, help me recognize Your signs and works, and respond with faith rather than fear.

psalm-105-28.verse:
He sent darkness and made it dark;
  And they did not rebel against His words.
psalm-105-28.prayer: Father, when darkness comes, let Your power and purpose still be known. Help me trust You in unseen places.

psalm-105-29.verse:
He turned their waters into blood
  And caused their fish to die.
psalm-105-29.prayer: Lord, You rule over creation and judgment. Help me live with reverence before Your authority.

psalm-105-30.verse:
Their land swarmed with frogs
  Even in the chambers of their kings.
psalm-105-30.prayer: Father, remind me that all creation responds to Your command. Help me listen and obey Your voice.

psalm-105-31.verse:
He spoke, and there came a swarm of flies
  And gnats in all their territory.
psalm-105-31.prayer: Lord, no detail is outside Your control. Teach me to trust Your power in both great and small things.

psalm-105-32.verse:
He gave them hail for rain,
  And flaming fire in their land.
psalm-105-32.prayer: Father, even storms obey You. Help me find peace in Your authority over every situation.

psalm-105-33.verse:
He struck down their vines also and their fig trees,
  And shattered the trees of their territory.
psalm-105-33.prayer: Lord, when what seems fruitful is shaken, help me trust Your purpose and remain faithful.

psalm-105-34.verse:
He spoke, and locusts came,
  And young locusts, even without number,
psalm-105-34.prayer: Father, You command even what seems overwhelming. Help me remember Your sovereignty over all circumstances.

psalm-105-35.verse:
And ate up all vegetation in their land,
  And ate up the fruit of their ground.
psalm-105-35.prayer: Lord, protect what You have planted in my life and help me depend on Your provision.

psalm-105-36.verse:
He also struck down all the firstborn in their land,
  The first fruits of all their vigor.
psalm-105-36.prayer: Father, remind me that life and protection belong to You. Keep my household and heart under Your care.

psalm-105-37.verse:
Then He brought them out with silver and gold,
  And among His tribes there was not one who stumbled.
psalm-105-37.prayer: Lord, thank You for bringing Your people out with provision and strength. Lead me forward with confidence in You.

psalm-105-38.verse:
Egypt was glad when they departed,
  For the dread of them had fallen upon them.
psalm-105-38.prayer: Father, when You move, nothing can stand against Your purpose. Help me trust Your deliverance.

psalm-105-39.verse:
He spread a cloud for a covering,
  And fire to illumine by night.
psalm-105-39.prayer: Lord, thank You for covering and guiding Your people. Lead me by Your presence each day.

psalm-105-40.verse:
They asked, and He brought quail,
  And satisfied them with the bread of heaven.
psalm-105-40.prayer: Father, thank You for hearing needs and providing daily bread. Teach me gratitude for every provision.

psalm-105-41.verse:
He opened the rock and water flowed out;
  It ran in the dry places like a river.
psalm-105-41.prayer: Lord, bring water from the rock in dry places. Refresh my soul with Your life-giving presence.

psalm-105-42.verse:
For He remembered His holy word
  With Abraham His servant;
psalm-105-42.prayer: Father, thank You for remembering Your holy word. Help me trust Your promises when I am waiting.

psalm-105-43.verse:
And He brought forth His people with joy,
  His chosen ones with a joyful shout.
psalm-105-43.prayer: Lord, thank You for leading Your people out with joy. Let deliverance produce praise in my heart.

psalm-105-44.verse:
He gave them also the lands of the nations,
  That they might take possession of the fruit of the peoples’ labor,
psalm-105-44.prayer: Father, thank You for giving inheritance and blessing according to Your purpose. Help me steward Your gifts faithfully.

psalm-105-45.verse:
So that they might keep His statutes
  And observe His laws,
  Praise the Lord!
psalm-105-45.prayer: Lord, help me keep Your statutes and observe Your laws with gratitude, obedience, and praise.

psalm-105-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for Your covenant faithfulness, mighty works, protection, provision, and perfect timing. Help me remember what You have done, seek Your strength continually, and trust Your promises through every season. Lead me with joy, refine me through waiting, and teach me to walk in obedience. May my life declare Your wonderful works and praise Your holy name.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
